response.justification: Exceeds the minimum 15-year engineering requirement with 30+ years of experience and solid technical foundation across full-stack development, infrastructure, and emerging AI systems. However, falls short on critical preferred qualifications: lacks Master's or PhD in AI field, shows no demonstrated AI products or platforms as core innovation, and lacks evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory work, or cloud platform roadmap strategy. Current AI-agent infrastructure role is recent and described too vaguely to assess whether it constitutes the recognized AI expertise required for this principal-level position.
strengths: Extensive 30+ year engineering background far exceeding 15-year minimum with clear progression through multiple seniority levels, currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq
Emerging AI platform expertise through current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating relevant hands-on knowledge
Proven ability to architect and build platforms from scratch (GISCollective, testing frameworks) with fluency across multiple languages and cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; formal education from 1998 with no advanced degree in the preferred AI specialization
No documented AI products, platforms, or recognized achievements where AI is the core innovation—current AI work appears recent and implementation-focused rather than strategic or published

No evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer advisory on technology adoption, or involvement in cloud/AI platform strategy and roadmap decisions; resume emphasizes hands-on technical work over leadership
